abilities.description: Your lion is a creature eager to take down its prey. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} by sending your lion to attack, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} by using them to intimidate your foes, add +2 as the predetor asserts its primal dominance.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} by sending your inescapable lion to chase down big game, roll +the lion's health. On a hit, give your lion +1 health. On a strong hit, also take +1 supply or +1 momentum.
When you or an ally makes a recovery move in the company of your protective lion, they are alert to trouble; add +1 as ever-watchful eyes guard against unseen dangers.
